title: Messaging Outcomes and Delivery Evidence in Go · Contract Triage
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible a typed outcome and ownership evidence record with one stale generation, blocked notification, goroutine leak, acknowledgement, route, or effect defect; locate cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a typed outcome and ownership evidence record and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defens…
objectives: Define producer, consumer, operator, security, accessibility, latency, loss, duplicate, and recovery evidence for one messaging outcome; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Distinguish commands, events, notifications, documents, and queries by ownership, audience, expected handling, and change semantics; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

State at-most-once, at-least-once, effectively-once effect, ordering, and durability claims without promising impossible end-to-end exactly-once delivery; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Transfer Evidence Plan
steps.instruction:
Order the Transfer Evidence Plan RabbitMQ and Go messaging evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Transfer Evidence Plan.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Transfer Evidence Plan assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Transfer Evidence Plan, keep Transfer Evidence Plan connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.text: A debug Go messaging team handles case 6314 during quorum failover exercise during a rolling broker restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to separate local publication, broker custody, and observable stakeholder effect; bound payload, queue, confirm-ledger, and handler bytes; then remove the parking binding and expose the remediation gap. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Plan browser models, Go compilation, vet, table tests, fuzzing, race and leak checks, disposable RabbitMQ integration, partition, restart, load, upgrade, and production transfer gates.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Transfer Evidence Plan has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Transfer Evidence Plan, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Transfer Evidence Plan precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Transfer Evidence Plan, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A debug Go messaging team handles case 6314 during quorum failover exercise during a rolling broker restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to separate local publication, broker custody, and observable stakeholder effect; bound payload, queue, confirm-ledger, and handler bytes; then remove the parking binding and expose the remediation gap. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Plan browser models, Go compilation, vet, table tests, fuzzing, race and leak checks, disposable RabbitMQ integration, partition, restart, load, upgrade, and production transfer gates.

For RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Transfer Evidence Plan, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A deterministic browser model or ordinary go test run proves broker replication, goroutine scheduling, and network recovery behavior.

options.text: Declare RabbitMQ and Go outcome, topology, ownership, identity, and byte, time, attempt, and concurrency budgets for the debug Transfer Evidence Plan case
Predict RabbitMQ and Go publish, route, custody, delivery, effect, failure, cancellation, and recovery outcomes for the debug Transfer Evidence Plan case
Run the smallest deterministic RabbitMQ and Go messaging model and retain inspectable changed-case evidence for the debug Transfer Evidence Plan case
Inject one changed RabbitMQ and Go failure, verify bounded cleanup, and state live-broker transfer limits for the debug Transfer Evidence Plan case

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Transfer Evidence Plan
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: rabbit-go-transfer-evidence-plan-tr8bys" that uses case 3265 to separate local publication, broker custody, and observable stakeholder effect. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import amqp091-go, open sockets, contact RabbitMQ, Docker, networks, databases, or external effects, read host state, execute host commands, or use credentials; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5 compile, vet, race, fuzz, leak, amqp091-go 1.12.0, RabbitMQ 4.3, TLS, partition, restart, load, upgrade, and production gates.
